Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4102 0 0}I can't see as well here... It's difficult for me to follow your readings.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}However, the enemy can't detect you either. I'll keep sending you information, so stay alert.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5120 0 0}The visibility here is rather poor. I can manage to see you all, but barely...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}At least the enemy won't be able to see you. Please stay calm, and you'll pull through![n]{f 1 1}
